entry.title: Re: Override Key Figure Fixing (Mass Delete)
entry.content:
Hello,

please see the following Help portal page in the section on 'Mass Deletion of Fixing Information'.  

Regards,
Chris
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Refurbishment Work Order - Transfer Posting
entry.content:
Hello Preethi,

The first question is - so the object is physically at your Vendor's location, right?
Did you reflect it in your SAP system already? 
It means you do the Transfer Posting from your Stock to Subcontracting Stock - with the 'O' indicator, which you noticed in your error.
You can do it fully manually via MIGO, or launch ADSUBCON and do it there.
The to be refurbished object has to be on the 'O' stock, with valuation type DAMAGED (or whatever it's called in your system).

Then you receive the refurbished object back, again via ADSUBCON or via MIGO.
Let me know if you solved it. 

Cheers,
Dan

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration API - Collection of OData Clients using JS/TS and SAP Cloud SDK
entry.content: @Willem_PardaensTy so much for the feedbacks and support, I've updated the repository README.md!

entry.title: Re: Quota / Incorrect planning figures
entry.content:
Hello

You have a base quantity allocated for supplier 1225337, so the quota arrangement is creating more proposals for vendor 132250 to adjust the allocated quantity according to the quotas. 

Regards,
Caetano

There is just a small typo (MS PowerPoint, not MS Project)

Punam.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner – Address Management at Business User
entry.content:
Thanks, @Andi_M , this is helpful. And maybe @Hemker_B can chime in.

However, it's also disturbing. Our IAM/IdP user provisioning system is providing the Last Name, Full Name, Display Name, NickName, Alias, etc of the SAP User object (not HCM (Employee object), not 1 or 2 BuPa objects (Natural Person). It's fine if there is a link between BuPa or Employee to User, but that's it: it's just a link. No "ownership" of User Attributes. 

What are options so that our External IAM can control the Last Name, First Name etc (the "black bordered area" in your very clear screenshot) of the SAP User / Identity / Principal (Business User)? (I also see weird behavior when getting "service user" (with no HCM / natural person link) details, but that should be directed to SAP Support / OSS.)

Is there customizing somewhere like TBZ_V_EEWA_SRC? Or is our only option to sever the BuPa-User connection by removing the link in table USR21?

entry.title: Re: $filter with 'and' / 'or' options for select query
entry.content: I know this is a very old thread, but in case anyone stumbles across it looking for an answer. This is still a limitation in the Gateway. For my particular scenario, I was able to get around it by using NE/AND to exclude the values I was not interested in instead of EQ/OR.

entry.title: Re: Refurbishment Work Order - Transfer Posting
entry.content: You can use ME2ON or ME2O - plus if you are using MIGO with a purchase order -- make sure the movement type on the right-hand side in 541--No other need to mention anything and the system should be able to take to move the stock to vendor (MBLB)

entry.title: How can I open one PM plan with two different equipment that have different cycle start date
entry.content:
How can I open one PM plan with two different equipment that have different cycle start date


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How can I open one PM plan with two different equipme...
entry.content: You can add two maintenance items - one for each equipment. Both these items will have the same cycle. It will not be possible to have different cycle start dates.

entry.title: Net due date calculation with Working Days only
entry.content:
We need to calculate the Net due date according to payment terms with skipping the non-working days (like Saturday / Sunday).

In short system should consider only working days during calculation of Net due date.

In Sap generally system calculate all days but we need to Skip the Saturday, Sunday & non working days during calculation of Net Due Date.

We did not find BADI or Public Cloud SAP Notes that could be used in an extensibility to meet this requirement.

Please, could you please guide in this regard, since i went through the many thread but there were not any concrete resolution on it.

entry.title: Re: Prevent billing doc creation when vbrk & vbrp rec...
entry.content: we need to set billing block in sales order after checking XVBRK, XVBRP,XKOMV tables record for a delivery where pricing is within decided margin so we are able to achieve that part using the user exit - USEREXIT_FILL_VBRK_VBRP in include

entry.title: Re: Prevent billing doc creation when vbrk & vbrp rec...
entry.content: RV60AFZC

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing error invalid equipment indicator association
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a Production Process where I use the Last Indicator Value object, but when I run it I get the following error:

The Production Process is configured and runs as follows:

 

The asset is configured and linked to an OPC UA connection as follows:

 

When checking the Production Process Monitor the following message appears:


{"errorCode":"HTTP400","errorMessage":"{\"message\":\"Invalid payload\",\"causeMessage\":\"Invalid payload. [Invalid equipment indicator association]\",\"code\":\"400\",\"correlationId\":\"44b74cd5-6a28-4772-665f-d301f6847c57\"}"}

Do you have any idea why this error can occur?

Thank you very much in advance for your help.
Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: Prevent billing doc creation when vbrk & vbrp rec...
entry.content: But that doesn't stop billing doc creation even if we set the fields vbak-faksk = 'Z4'. and vbap-faksp = 'Z4'.

entry.title: Re: B4HANA SQL Script Execution
entry.content:
From GUI, DB02 is the only option. Alternative, you have to navigate from HANA studio/ Eclipse to execute SQL queries directly against the HANA database.

In SAP HANA Studio/ Eclipse: Navigate to the SQL Console by right-clicking on your system connection and selecting "Open SQL Console."

In SAP HANA Database Explorer: Open SAP HANA Database Explorer through the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) or the SAP HANA Cloud platform. Connect to your HANA instance. Use the SQL console to run your SQL queries.

entry.title: cms calendar
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a custom 2nd Business Day CMS calendar for our monthly reports. The Labor Day holiday threw the schedule off by a day; our monthly reports will run tomorrow, 9/4, instead of today, 9/3. I tried to get them to run today and changed the scheduled date on the CMS calendar from 9/4 to 9/3. This didn't work, so I changed the scheduled date back to tomorrrow, 9/4.  However - our reports run on a trigger event. My question is: will reports need their recurrence changed in order for the event to get triggered overnight tonight?  I hope this is not the case as there are over 200 monthly reports.  The recurrence on these reports is showing as updated as of this morning, when I changed the calendar.

The trigger file gets replaced at around 4:30AM.

Attached are screenshots of one recurrence.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: What’s New for SAP Integration Suite – August 2024
entry.content: Do we have an option of assigning a proprietary message from a Trading Partner in TPM in Type System under B2B Scenario? I only see the pre-defined options from the drop-down.

entry.title: Re: Prevent billing doc creation when vbrk & vbrp rec...
entry.content: And then populate XVBFS for error endling. PERFORM VBFS_HINZUFUEGEN USING LIPS-POSNR '065' VBAP-VBELN VBAP-POSNR SPACE. SY-SUBRC = 4. EXIT.

entry.title: Re: Prevent billing doc creation when vbrk & vbrp rec...
entry.content: we need a solution to stop billing doc creation after xvbrk xvbrp structures are filled to do validation when these tables are filled we are able to do validation but unsuccessful in stopping the billing doc creation. We need the solution for background run using VF06, VF04 so that next billing doc creation is not interrupted if the previous billing doc is not created and we are dealing with delivery related billing doc creation.

entry.title: Re: Understanding SuccessFactors Pay Scale Structure and its related features
entry.content:
Hi MicheleCordano,

I haven't tested but my first instinct would be to make sure that the user doing the Tarif change have the permission in Employee Central Import Settings to enable rule on import for comp info / job info. Let me know if it works, it will save me time when I get the requirements!

Cheers,
Stéphanie

entry.title: Re: Return to supplier process in case of replaced Goods
entry.content:
Hi,

If the material master already exists and it is just new batch or characteristics then you just need to update the Material master for the Characteristics in Classification view of MM. For batch you have two options one you can create the new batch while doing GR or can create through a t code MSC1N.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing error invalid equipment ind...
entry.content:
Have you tried removing "/" from 'structurePath' or omitting 'structurePath' mapping completely?
I suggest you check this detailed blog post: Last Indicator Value in Line Monitor POD within SAP Digital Manufacturing and review your setup.
Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: To stop Email notifications related to workitems
entry.content:
Hi,

If you have the program name just search in SM37 what background job is sending those emails and there you can edit the Variant and can remove those two people name from it. Also, please check SOST which may give you more idea.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: Here's the revised version.

entry.title: Re: Last Indicator Value in Line Monitor POD within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: Hello @jppalominos , as described in the blog, you can either use Automatic Triggers of Subscription type to monitor each tag value changes in the OPC server and call this Production Process sending the latest tag values as input to 'inValue' for each indicator, or you can use an Automatic Triggers of Timer type to call a Production Process every X interval that reads the current tag values and calls Last Indicator Value for each indicator. Hope it helps, Manoel

entry.title: Using Default Route transit time in the Freight Unit scheduling
entry.content:
Hello TM experts,

One of the TM master data that is frequently used in our customers process is the Default Route. It helps us correctly generate the freight stages when additional stages need to be considered during a freight execution. For example, in an export scenario, if we have to consider road transport to the port of origin, sea freight to the port of destination and also the last road leg to the end customer, it is the default route that helps us specify the correct breakdown of these stages.

One of the features of the Default Route is that we can register the transit time of each stage and during the creation of the transport documents, this time is considered to calculate the departure and arrival dates of each stop. When we use a process coming from a FWO, this use is clearer. However, I often see doubts about how to use this when creating the TOR documents. This blog aims to provide a step-by-step guide on what needs to be configured for this to work. So let's go step by step:

1) Create your default route specifying your transit time:

2) Make your Freight Unit Building Rule consider the application of default route:

3) Here's the golden tip: Just having the transit time registered in the default route does not tell the system the correct way to use it. To do this, we need to create a planning profile with a scheduling strategy to be considered. Here I used the strategy without optimization (VSS_EMBED), calculating the times from the arrival date backwards. Don't forget to register the planning horizon in the selection profile:

4) Add this planning profile to your freight unit configuration. Additionally, enable automatic DDD calculation. When creating a FU where DDD calculation is enabled, the TM checks if there is a default route being used and a registered planning profile to then perform the calculation. If there is no planning profile, it proceeds to call the DDD settings. If it is not configured, it does not perform this calculation:

5) Make the other logistics integration settings so that your document integrates correctly with the TM and uses your created FUBR (The settings may vary if your implementation is embedded or side-car, but they are not the focus of this process).

6) Let's test it!

(Screenshot from internal SAP environments)

Feel free to leave your comments and suggestions.

entry.title: Re: workflows approvers automatic update
entry.content:
Hi Jerry, I think this is a huge win for you when you implement this. Basically in any workflow, you can create a method to look for the necessary approvers prior to the actual approval task. You can also define a Rule (PFAC) to locate your approvers, but over time, I have found that I prefer to have the 1 - 'Get Approvers' task immediately preceding the 2 - 'Do Approval' and pass the results from  step 1 to step 2 using the WF container.

These approvers can be found in the Org Structure (preferred) or in a table.   You can even use the name of the person who created or changed an object, and find their 'boss' via the Org Structure.

We look in the Org Structure for almost all of our approvers.  They may be identified by their position, job, assignment to a custom SAP Org Object, or a relationship from their position to an organization.  As with many things in SAP, there are multiple ways to do this.  For example, if you decide that your Vendor Invoice Approvers need to hold a custom relationship to the organization on the receiving end of the invoice - in my world, we can always navigate from the main cost center to a specific org unit, so we were able to define a custom relationship linking Invoice Approvers to the org unit(s) incurring the costs.

Then you can write a FM or method to look for that Org Unit, and find the positions that hold that custom relationship.  You would execute this method prior to your approval task, and bind the results into the WF container, and then have your approval task be delivered to the agents in that multiline container element.

Using the HR Org structure has some built-in benefits - mostly that the people must be actively employed.  If you can do that, then I'll point you to RH_STRUC_GET as a FM that will be useful to you.

You can also attach SAP Org Objects to people/positions/jobs and look up the holders via table HRP1208.  For more on this approach, see https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-US/4e/ef52aa451757dde10000000a421bc1/content.htm?no_cache=true

Good luck!

Sue

entry.title: Re: SAP Purchase requisition APP - scale pricing not show...
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no link between PIR and PR. You can maintain price scale at PIR but it will only be visible when you create a PO. At PR level PIR data will not be visible.

Thanks,

Sanan

Are you using Flexable workflow?

Please check the below Note:

2421360 - Action Buttons are not displayed in Fiori My inbox App - SAP for Me

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: VLMS On Mobile
entry.content:
Hello @BijuG,

Please see available SAP SuccessFactors Apps. There are three SAP SuccessFactors apps available for iOS mobile devices. The titles are listed as they appear in the Apple App Store.

  • SAP Validated Learning

  • SAP Validated Learning Preview

  • SAP SuccessFactors Mobile

And for standard supported features, please see SAP SuccessFactors Mobile Features

See Also: 2736082 - SuccessFactors Learning Administration is not supported on smartphone browsers

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Favorite book and SAP Community Readers?
entry.content:
Great questions.  Sometimes I will read parts of a book and skip chapters - for example, any book about the Kennedys - I'll skip chapters.  I don't think I simply stopped reading a book.

I do read multiple books at the same time - I am usually reading a fiction, biography and self help books all at the same time!

entry.title: Re: SAP Purchase requisition APP - scale pricing not show...
entry.content:
PR does not have scale pricing -nor it make sense from a business point of view. If your PIR is the source of supply, the valuation price would be based on the material master valuation. At the time of Ordering, Scales price was adopted in the PO. 

In Short, PR there is no scale pricing. PIR scale pricing is only available via WebGui T-codes-- SAP S4 manage purchasing info records does not have that functionality or does not allow or display scale pricing.

entry.title: Re: Using NFC or similar contactless technology for labor...
entry.content:
Hi,

Sure! I would expect that a NFC reader or a barcode scanner would work just fine as input methods, just like a regular keyboard for entering the badge information. I mean, if the focus is on the badge field, I would expect that a locally connected NFC reader or barcode scanner would just read the data and drop it in the badge field.

In any case, if you need anything different, you can always consider custom POD plugins and Time Tracking APIs, see: https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_timetracking/resource/Attendance

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content: Task 4:

entry.title: Re: Using Badges for Labor Tracking in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @OliverQB ,

Sure! I would expect that a NFC reader or a barcode scanner would work just fine as input methods, just like a regular keyboard for entering the badge information. I mean, if the focus is on the badge field, I would expect that a locally connected NFC reader or barcode scanner would just read the data and drop it in the badge field.

In any case, if you need anything different, you can always consider custom POD plugins and Time Tracking APIs, see: https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_timetracking/resource/Attendance

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Return to supplier process in case of replaced Goods
entry.content:
1. Return PO means -- You have 161--then Credit memo to be posted -- You may have done the first 2 steps --Now if the vendor is supplying the materials as a replacement -- only option is to create a new PO or 2nd line item on the same PO as the same amount as created return PO-- then perform 101 with new characteristics -- and post the invoice as the same amount as credit memo

You could save yourself from posting credit memos and invoices if you have checked the free indicator for both lines while creating the PO and before posting 161.

entry.title: Re: 7 Most Commonly Asked Questions About Package Configuration Manager for SAP SuccessFactors Solut
entry.content:
Now that the OpenSAP courses have been sunset, can someone update the links/references to the OpenSAP with their corresponding LearningHub URLs/course names?

Thanks
Chandra

entry.title: Understanding the Source of 'To Do List' Dates in SAP CATS Classic Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently configuring the "My Time Sheet" app in SAP Fiori for use with CATS Classic. I've successfully set up employees in both the HR Mini Master and PPOME. Within the app, there is a "To Do List" tab that displays all the days for which time has not been reported.

I would like to understand the logic behind how the system determines which dates appear in this "To Do List." Specifically, from which date does the system start tracking the days without time entries? Is this based on the employee's start date, or is there another date that the system uses to begin counting?

Any insights or explanations on how the "To Do List" dates are generated would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Meas doc creation allows points for items not related...
entry.content: As far my understanding goes -you have to enforce the use of measurement points belonging to FL or Equipment in the notification using the BADI only -- but make sure to perform negative testing thoroughly for entry list or individual measurement point entry as well.

entry.title: Re: Using Badges for Labor Tracking in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @UtkarshRaj , 

Yes! When you approve time records for direct labor that contain a standard value, the duration is transferred to integrated ERP systems. Learn more at: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/labor-tracking

The flag you enabled ('Report Duration of Production Time to ERP') does not automatically report time back to ERP, 'Enable Auto-Approval for Time Records' should do it. Learn more about time tracking flags at: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/manage-business-settings

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: EBBR - Fixed Price Cost Based POC: Plan Cost is doubl...
entry.content:
Hi Owen,

Thank you for your reply, but the problem is, everywhere I look I see the amount I would expect, the 12.986. So also for the project in the Plan Customer Projects app. We have checked accruals, plan data, the project itself (plan customer projects), all postings, different plan versions. Everything seems to be correct, yet the calculation is still using double the amount. 

Regards,

Thijs

entry.title: Monitor Material coverage App Insights - Shortage definitions
entry.content:
Intro:

Let us see some Information about the Monitor Material coverage app.

Overview.

Difference between MMC - Net segment vs Net / individual Segment - SAP Help & Blog 

Monitor Material Coverage - Net segment - Considers Planning Segments 20 and 22.

20 - An individual customer segment is created per individual customer order for make-to-order production.

22 - An individual project segment is created per project for project planning.

Monitor Material Coverage - Net / Individual segment - Considers Planning Segments 20, 22 and 24.

In addition to 20 and 22, '24 - Segment is created for materials that are directly produced or procured without planning' also considered.

In direct production/procurement the production/ Purchase orders will be created for components on creating the Production/purchase orders for header materials - special procurement key 52 - LINK

SIMG - Production - Material Requirements Planning - Planning - Direct Production/Procurement.

Prerequisite's

Define Material Shortage Profiles

SIMG - Production - Material Requirements Planning - Apps for Material Requirements Planning - General Settings - Define Material Shortage Profiles

Define Supply and Demand Profiles

Here you can define which receipts and requirements are to be considered for respective shortage definition profiles

SIMG - Production - Material Requirements Planning - Apps for Material Requirements Planning - General Settings - Define Supply and Demand Profiles

Main Part.

Master data - BOM - Materials PPA24, PPA22

Stock Availability bar - Used the Material PPA22

At beginning I have create a Master data and PIR demand. Later opened the MMC app. But I could not able to see any Stock Availability bar.

Later I change the chart setting to see the bar.

Colors in days field

In case you are facing the same issue pls change the time period in configure chart to cover the demand period.

Some times the color field is not working. Day supply field will show how many days will the available stock can fulfill the requirements. 

The color in respective fields are based on values maintained in the app Maintain Time-Dependent Stock Levels. The values are Safety days of supply, Target days of supply, Maximum days of supply.

Red color - No of First shortage days < SDOS - here 35 not < 10 so not applicable

Yellow color - SDOS =< No of first shortage days < TDOS - here 10= < 35 < 50 - applicable

Green color - SDOS < TDOS =< No of first shortage days - here 10 < 50 not =<  35 - NA

Click on stock availability and click check manage material coverage to see the requirements in details.

Definition of Fields in this app. Using the same below example 

First shortage on - Date on which the first shortage occurs.

Here its 24.10.2024 because I have a dependent requirement on that day.

Days' Supply - It will consider stock, receipt and requirements for calculating the material shortage days as like MD04. 

Days' supply = First shortage day - Current day = 24.10.2024 - 03.09.2024 = 35 days (Only working days)

You can use this link to calculate. Also took reference from Future evolution in MMC

Stock Day supply - It will consider only stocks and requirements for calculating material shortage days. Planned receipts are not considered. 

Stock Day supply = First shortage day (Excluding receipt) - Current day = 24.10.2024 - 03.09.2024 = 35 days

Intraday Supply = Days’ Supply + Fractional Coverage on the Day of the First Shortage.

Intraday Supply = Days' supply + Stock / Requirement on shortage day

                          =  35 + 23/30 = 35 + 0.36 = 35.76 days

Stock Intraday Supply = Stock Days’ Supply + Fractional Coverage on the Day of the First Shortage.

No receipts are Considered 

Stock Intraday Supply = Stock Days' supply + Stock / Requirement on shortage day

                          =  35 + 10 / 30 = 35 + 0.33 = 35.33 days

Shortage Definition - used the material PPB24 for this example (Link) 

Based on the prerequisites IMG configuration the system calculate the material shortage days. For example by considering the demands only or demands and supply or confirmed receipts or planned receipts. Here lets see result of the standard configurations.

MRP Standard - It will consider all supplies and demands to calculate the material shortage like MD04 as per the standard configs. (Made some changes)

Manage material coverage app

First Shortage day = 01.08.2024

Days' supply = First shortage day - Current day = 01.08.2024 - 03.09.2024 = -24 days

Stock Day supply = First shortage day (Excluding receipt) - Current day = 1 day (doubt)

Intraday Supply = Days' supply + Stock / Requirement on shortage day = -24 + 10/11 = -24.00 day (doubt)

Stock Intraday Supply = Stock Days' supply + Stock / Requirement on shortage day = 1 + 9/30 = 0.00 day (doubt)

Stock Day Supply - It will consider the stock and demands to calculate the material shortage as per the standard configs. No Receipts considered. PIR also not considered. You can add it by your own.

First Shortage day = 22.11.2024

Days' supply = First shortage day - Current day = 22.11.2024 - 03.09.2024 = 55 days

Stock Day supply = First shortage day (Excluding receipt) - Current day = 22.11.2024 - 03.09.2024 =  55 days

Intraday Supply = Days' supply + Stock / Requirement on shortage day = 55 + 9/30 = 55.30 days

Stock Intraday Supply = Stock Days' supply + Stock / Requirement on shortage day = 55 + 9/30 = 55.30 days

Ordered Requirements - It will consider the stock and receipts to calculate the material shortage as per standard configs. No demands considered

As there is no shortage every dates are 9999.

Ordered Receipts - It will considers the stock, demand and confirmed receipts to calculate the material shortage as per the standard configs. No Purchase Requisition or Planned order considered

First Shortage day = 22.11.2024

Days' supply = First shortage day - Current day = 22.11.2024 - 03.09.2024 = 55 days

Stock Day supply = First shortage day (Excluding receipt) - Current day = 22.11.2024 - 03.09.2024 =  55 days

Intraday Supply = Days' supply + Stock / Requirement on shortage day = 55 + 11/30 = 55.36 days (doubt)

Stock Intraday Supply = Stock Days' supply + Stock / Requirement on shortage day = 55 + 9/30 = 55.30 days 

Note: I have expected that the Days' Supply, Stock Day supply, Intraday Supply, Stock Intraday Supply will be calculated according to the shortage definition in initial screen of MMC app. Its working inside the manage material coverage app in real time, but not in Monitor material coverage app.

I have increased the evaluation horizon of other shortage definition profiles.

After some times these Days' Supply, Stock Day supply, Intraday Supply, Stock Intraday Supply days were calculated respectively based on the shortage definition. Kindly share your experience if you faced any delay in this app.

Conclusion:

I hope you this may help you on understanding the Monitor Material coverage app. Please refer Link & this to have good idea on implementing the changes in it. Please clarify on (doubt) areas

entry.title: Re: Internal Error (-1) Occured [131-183] during Quick Co...
entry.content:
hi @francesca3007 

(I apologize in advance for my spelling mistakes. I use translate because my English is not good.)

I encountered a similar problem today. Since I could not find a clear solution from what was written, I wanted to share what I found. First of all, the link I used is here;
https://www.sapxiaocui.top/index.php/archives/33/

My problem: When I ran the quick copy, I was getting the error "Internal error(-1) 131-183".
I found my faulty tables using the queries that show errors in user-defined tables and fields from the link I gave above.

 

Spoiler
DETECTION QUERIES FOR HANA:
1) UDT is defined but does not exist. 

select T0."TableName" from OUTB T0 where not exists (select 1 from sys.tables T1 where T1.schema_name = current_schema and T1.is_system_table = 'FALSE' and T1.table_name = '@' || "TableName");

this query gave me inconsistent tables that were not in Hana Sql but were in Sap Business One user tables.
Since these tables were deleted, I could not delete them from user defined tables. For this, I recreated the relevant tables and deleted them from Sap user tables.
When I tried again, the connection was established successfully and I performed the copy operation.

 

I hope it helps others.
Good work.

entry.title: Re: Using Default Route transit time in the Freight Unit scheduling
entry.content:
Well done sir ! thanks for sharing.

Best regards,

Adrien MANIER

entry.title: SAP IBP Excel 2402-2408: Access Denied
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm getting the below error, Access Denied, when trying to access the SAP IBP Excel UI. It started on Friday 8/30/2024 and has not yet been resolved. I was on SAP IBP 2402 when I first had the error. Today I'm still getting it even after upgrading to SAP IBP 2408 Excel Add In. I was able to get into excel while on 2408 for a couple hours but then I got the Access Denied again, so I'm not sure what's going on. My planning views wouldn't load either so I probably need to update those too with a newer version of the planning views. My issue is more just getting into excel again. I've also restarted my computer several times and almost all my coworkers are facing the same issue. Is this a new SAP issue that is currently being resolved or is there something else I should do?

Thanks,

Melanie

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow for Maintenance in S/4 HANA

Hi, I couldnt find that app: Workflow for asset management.

I've been using Sap S4/hana cloud Public edition 2024 for Perú. Trying to do the test with the scoped item 4HH. In this scoped item it is described how the user can configurate workflows for maintenance orders through the app: Manage Workflows for Maintenance Orders - Asset Management (F4989) but I cant find it.

Can anybody help me find it? maybe its a role issue or maybe its an issue of the cloud version that I am using.

This is a screenshot of 4HHThis is a screenshot of the 4HH

This is a screenshot of the Public edition 2024 server for Perú 

This is a photo of the server public edition 2024 for Perú

These are my roles

There is my rolesAnd the rest

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management

entry.title: Re: Discover the SAP Community - How-To Video Series
entry.content: Thanks Mr Blue Beard @josh_bentley for all your effort and sharing with us !!!

entry.title: Re: Single Sign On
entry.content:
Hi Janet,

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, including its CBC, has its own Cloud Identity Services to control access. As far as how to configure SSO, you can refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/auth-idp-enable-idp-initiated-sso-from-all-corporate-identity-providers and other related documentation. 

By the way, CBC is for customer business scenario configurations, not for authorization related work.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow for Maintenance in S/4 HANA
entry.content: @Daniel villa ocupar App Manage Work flow for Asset Management

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch #5 Innovant : SAP Supers heroes
entry.content:
Bonjour @Amaury_Van-Espen 

 

Malheureusement, pas de calendrier, car tout dépend des intervenants et de la logistique autour (lieu, sponsors, etc.) : Difficile de donner de la visibilité. Néanmoins, nous essayons de notre mieux d'annoncer les évènements dès que possible (~ 1 mois avant), que ce soit ici ou sur LinkedIn et Meetup.
Mon conseil : rester connecté pour ne rien manquer ! 😉

À bientôt !

entry.title: Re: Tolerance key AN is not triggered
entry.content:
Please check Note 2540351

 

You could be missing the  SPRO--> MM--> LIV --> Item Amount Check setting

entry.title: Building a business data fabric: SAP Datasphere vs. DIY implementations
entry.content:
Providing your teams with relevant, real-time analysis enables them to make more informed and agile business decisions. But we often hear from customers that scattered information and siloed data prevent their employees from getting the rapid insights they need.

That’s why so many enterprises are looking to revolutionize data management by building a business data fabric. This is a data management architecture that focuses on delivering an integrated, semantically-rich data layer over underlying data landscapes to provide seamless and scalable access to data without duplication. But when it comes to building a business data fabric, what is the best approach?

Putting SAP Datasphere to the test

SAP Datasphere, a comprehensive data service built on SAP Business Technology Platform, is the foundation for a business data fabric. It enables organizations to deliver meaningful data to every data consumer—with business context and logic intact. It provides capabilities from data ingestion through self-service data access across SAP and non-SAP data.  

In its Data Fabric Field Test: SAP vs. DIY, GigaOm measured the ease of use, time, effort, and total cost of deploying SAP Datasphere as compared to a do-it-yourself (DIY) approach to building a data fabric with a blend of other applications. The DIY implementation path included solutions for data warehousing and data integration, along with a data catalog and data lake. The results are very compelling:  

Ease of use

GigaOm evaluated the ease of use when it comes to carrying out a variety of data management tasks. It found that, compared to the DIY approach, SAP Datasphere was on average 23.1% easier to use, with data modeling 72.4% easier and data security 78.6% easier.

Time

The report found that deploying SAP Datasphere took significantly less time than building the DIY implementation path. In fact, the initial build timeline for SAP Datasphere was about 2.5 times shorter.

Effort

To quantify effort, GigaOm evaluated the amount of effort required for enterprises to complete the three main stages of establishing a data fabric, which they defined as:

  1. Initial build/migration
  2. Continuous integration and delivery (CI/CD) of new features and enhancements
  3. Administration (including maintenance and user support)

For all three stages, the report found that deploying SAP Datasphere requires less effort than the DIY approach. And for the CI/CD and maintenance stages, GigaOm found that it takes about a third to a half of the headcount to run SAP Datasphere as compared to the DIY implementation path.

Total cost

Across all data fabric sizes, the infrastructure costs to support SAP Datasphere were about 69% lower than those of the DIY approach. The report also found that SAP Datasphere provided a savings of 63% on initial build costs, 53% on CI/CD costs, and 41% on administration costs. What’s more, the solution reduced total cost of ownership by 138% over a three-year period.


Find out more

In my next two blogs, I’ll highlight the ROI and deployment best practices for SAP Datasphere. In the meantime, read the GigaOm Data Fabric Field Test: SAP vs. DIY study to learn more.

entry.title: Re: Safety Technician Persona in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content: The new Fiori-based WCM in SAP S/4HANA is called Permit To Work (PTW). This was built on the new version of PM supporting a phased approach. SSAM is completely integrated with this too, however it's important to mention LOTO is missing from PTW, therefore the safety technician persona has less features in this case (everything like with the legacy WCM, except for the LOTO).

entry.title: Re: 7 Most Commonly Asked Questions About Package Configuration Manager for SAP SuccessFactors Solut
entry.content:
Hello Chandra, 

This is the link to the course on LearningHub : Package Configuration Manager for SAP SuccessFactors Solutions

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning for Expenses based on Income ratio for t...
entry.content: Hi @Wahid, Lookup formula shows the aggregated value for all members (including filtered out members). In your case, I expect the formula is LOOKUP([Amount],[d/GL_Account]=("Sales")), and this formula returns "500" for all GL_Account members. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/2784376d431e4a7da9564880dadb084d.html

entry.title: Re: Debug Tips for program RFFOEDI1
entry.content:
Hello,
Excellent explanation. Very useful...

It is difficult to send a pdf file that generates the payment advice through F110 to the SAP Ariba portal.

Ariba, indicates that you implement an extension,

https://help.sap.com/docs/sisgw/sap-ariba-cloud-integration-gateway-migration-guide/how-to-implement-customer-exit-for-payment-remittance-to-fill-data-into-custom-segments?locale=en-US&version=2405

This is already implemented, but a segment must be created in that include (ZXF08U01) E1ARBCIG_ATTACH_HDR_DET. This segment is part of the idoc that goes to the SAP Ariba portal. And it must be filled with the pdf in hex format. (OTF)

In the program RFFOEDI1 that is used by F110. It makes a call on line 367, it calls the FI_EDI_REMADV_PEXR2001_OUT function, and reaches the exit ZXF08U01. At this point it is not possible to obtain the OTF that is required..

It is difficult to obtain the OTF in the ZXF08U01 include, and be able to send it to the SAP Ariba portal.

There is a similar topic but for POs. But it does not work for payments in F110, I leave a link

https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-blogs-by-members/send-sapscript-form-pdf-from-output-type-message-to-business-network/ba-p/13579642

I appreciate your understanding.

Thank you

entry.title: multi-currency pasting -invalid currency
entry.content:
I created a JE, fill in a foreign currency in Debit (FC) ,  a prompt " invalid currency" appeared. 

I checked : currency settings / Enable Multi-Currency transactions / exchange rate setup, they are work.

What is problem? Please advise. (This function was working fine before)

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content:
@Ryan-Crosby - so sorry to bother you again but facing a weird issue with xsl when I test with payload with body in it.

This is ultimately causing the iflow to fail as below statement has an error

 <xsl:value-of select="sapci:setProperty($exchange, 'MyProperty', $nspace)"/>

XSL:

<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:sapci="http://sap.com/it/" exclude-result-prefixes="sapci">
<xsl:param name="exchange"/>
<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::*"/>
<message>
<xsl:value-of select="$nspace"/>
</message>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

Example Payload with <Field1> in the body:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<root xmlns="http://example.com/a" xmlns:ns2="http://example.com/b"> 
  <Field1>Hello</Field1>
 </root>          

XSL output produces multiple lines

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<message>
http://example.com/a http://example.com/b http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace
http://example.com/a http://example.com/b http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace
</message>

But if I remove the <Field1> in the payload, xml output is 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><message>http://example.com/a http://example.com/b http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace</message>

entry.title: Re: How to influence pptx filename on SEN playback?
entry.content:
Hi Wallace,

Sorry, I don't think that there is any way to modify the name of the uploaded PPT file inside Producer.  Producer renames the content object so that it can uniquely manage that object and prevents the unique ID from being changed.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Inventory valuation check
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: USER SUBSCRIPTIONS ARE NOT DISPLAYED
entry.content: Hi Community. This case arises due to a jam in the backend and the sap agent solves this type of cases. Thanks to all.

entry.title: Re: Is task list Post Copy Automation (PCA) supported in BW4?
entry.content: Based on my experience, which is limited but growing quickly, No. I have had to reconfigure SDI after every system refresh. I will be asking the experts @ ASUG Tech Conference in November 2024 if there is some undocumented method. As far as SDI is concerned, nothing changes. The changes are all in Hana, why can't the tables get exported and reimported after the DB copy is done just like everything else?? So, sorry that I can't give an answer that will make your world a little better, but we share the same pain. If I get an answer @ ASUG, I'll post it here. I am bookmarking the page. Cheers! Wm.

entry.title: Re: Auto Replenishment TO not working
entry.content: <deleted>

entry.title: Re: Auto Replenishment TO not working
entry.content:
My understanding is that LP21 never creates automatic TO from TR.

When Fixed Bin's quantity goes below min qty in material master by any kind of WM movement (For example Bin-to-Bin), at that time system automatically creates TO behind the scene.

entry.title: Re: Error activating Business Content Sales Analysis in S...
entry.content: Did you receive any suggestions? Were they able to help you?

entry.title: Re: Error activating Business Content Sales Analysis in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Were you able to resolve this issue? The same thing is happening to me, in QAS that field does not exist but it asks me for it in PRD

entry.title: How to automatically bulk create virtual tables dynamically in code?
entry.content: Hi we are accessing many tables and views from a remote system and wondered how to bulk create virtual tables?

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: I will take a look at it tomorrow when I'm sitting down in my office.

entry.title: Re: How to automatically bulk create virtual tables dynam...
entry.content:
Hi this code will create bulk VT to the remote system.

first manually create virtual table locally to the SYS.table_columns system catalog in the remote. Assuming someone in admin has set up a remote source in your local system and you have access to system objects. 

eg in this example we are using table_columns to source table names.

CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE "MY_LOCAL_SCHEMA"."vt_table_columns_remote_db"
AT "MY_Remote_source_name"."MYDb"."SYS"."TABLE_COLUMNS";

This below select will generate the SQL code for all the VT create statements you need.

SELECT DISTINCT 
'CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE ' || '"' || schema_name || '"."VT_' || table_name || 
'" AT ' || '"MY_Remote_source_name"."MYDb".' || 
'"' || schema_name || '"."' || table_name || '";'
FROM 
(
SELECT DISTINCT 
schema_name,
table_name
FROM vt_table_columns_remote_db
)
Just cut and paste this code and run. Note, it is not possible (currently) to exec immediate the code generated from this SQL you have to cut and paste and run the output. FYI.
 
You can also create VT to views by using the SYS.views similarly.
 
You can add filters as required. 
WHERE  table_name LIKE '%MYTABLES%'
AND schema_name LIKE '%MYSCHEMAS%'
 
Note any tables with geometry are not supported so you can ad this filter.
AND table_name NOT IN
(SELECT DISTINCT table_name
FROM vt_table_columns_remote_db
WHERE DATA_TYPE_NAME LIKE 'ST%'
 
To work around this issue see my post here

entry.title: Regarding the Automated Operation of GUIMenuBar
entry.content:
When using "VB. Net" to execute the following code, statements that operate on GUIMenuBar are invalid，
session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[0]/menu[3]/menu[1]").select()

The complete code is as follows：

Dim SapGuiAuto As Object = Nothing
Dim application As Object = Nothing
Dim connection As Object = Nothing
Dim session As Object = Nothing

Try
SapGuiAuto = GetObject("SAPGUI")
application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine


如果不是 TypeOf 应用程序是 GuiApplication，则
SapGuiAuto = Nothing
返回
End 如果

connection = 应用程序。儿童（0）

如果不是 TypeOf 连接是 GuiConnection，则
应用程序 = 无
SapGuiAuto = 无
返回
End 如果

session = 连接。儿童（0）

如果不是 TypeOf 会话是 GuiSession 则
连接 = 无
应用程序 = 无
SapGuiAuto = 无
返回
结束 If
session.findById（“wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd”）。文本 = “/nZ9PP22”
session.findById（“wnd[0]”）.sendVKey（0）
session.findById（“wnd[0]/usr/ctxt[0]”）.文本 = “N”
session.findById（“wnd[0]/usr/ctxt[1]”）。文本 = “334921201”
session.findById（“wnd[0]/usr/ctxt[3]”）。文本 = “2701”
session.findById（“wnd[0]/usr/rad[2]”）.选择
session.findById（“wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]”）.press

session.findById（“wnd[0]/usr/cntlGRID1/shellcont/shell”）.setCurrentCell（-1， “PLPOD-VORNR”）
session.findById（“wnd[0]/usr/cntlGRID1/shellcont/shell”）.selectColumn（“PLPOD-VORNR”）

session.findById（“wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[29]”）.press
session.findById（“wnd[1]/usr/ssub/1/ctxt[0]”）.Text = “0020”
session.findById（“wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]”）.press's.findById
（“wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[45]”）.press
Dim savepath As String = $“C：\Users\{APS_Auxiliary_Form.id（）}\Downloads\”
Dim filename As String = “z9ppp22_23_order.xlsx”
Dim _filepath As String = Path.Combine（savepath， filename）
session.findById（“wnd[0]/mbar/menu[0]/menu[3]/menu[1]”）.select（）
Catch ex As Exception
Console.WriteLine（例如消息）
Finally
session = 无
连接 = 无应用程序
= 无
SapGuiAuto = 无
结束尝试

entry.title: order BOM explode in a sales order line
entry.content:
hi everyone I want to ask a question about order bom.

1.I create an sales order item with item category TAP (which means the pricing at line-item level)

2.I create the corresponding order-bom with T-code: CS61

I want to explode the order-bom in the sales order line. how to do with it. where is the re-load of the BOM in sales order line? because I go back to sales order line, the components are not displayed in structure tabpage.

thanks!

or can you tell me, for SAP standard solution, is it true that bom explode in sales order is only useful for material bom NOT order-BOM?

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing error invalid equipment ind...
entry.content: Thank you very much Manoel, certainly removing the StructurePath parameter worked correctly. I thought that when creating a structure that parameter should be filled, but in this case it should not be filled. I assume that when it is a structure with more levels it should apply. Best regards,

entry.title: New bank Transfer payment method setting
entry.content:
Hello,

I made a payment data and clearing document.  

I have some questions.

1) Does it connect with MBC?

2) How is connect the bank information and transfer real payment?

3) Is it can use the workflows of paying bank account?

Thank you in advance.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: New bank Transfer payment method setting
entry.content:
Hello,

For MBC, if you have activated the scope item 16R, then the system will automatically send payment instructions, receive status notifications, receive bank statements, and receive lockbox messages. And you can find the test script of the scope item via https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolP/16R.

For setting workflows of paying bank account, you can reach for test script of scope item J78 where the URL is https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2408/SolP/J78?region=DE.

Also here is some documents may help you Payments and Bank Communications | SAP Help Portal.

Please make sure if you have activated the related scope item when using the specific functions.

entry.title: Re: Facing 401 unauthorized error while trying post data to CPI via SAP API Management
entry.content:
Hi Madhura,

HTTP 404 is fine when doing a connectivity test. It simply is a ping test to the Cloud Integration Tenant and means its gone through successfully. 
HTTP 401 comes when you have an unauthorised access. This might be coming when you are hitting the exact iflow URL via APIM. 
Please check the username and password that was configured in keyvalue map. Another way to check that your credential is being passed correctly is to check the request headers just before hitting the Cloud Integration Tenant and ensure that the Authorization header has the exact same value as you would have in Postman. Base 64 encrypted username/password.

Please refer to the below two posts and also have a read through the comments and these might be helpful. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-api-management-expose-integration-flow-endpoint-as-api/qaq-p/13709849
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-api-management-discover-integration-flows-from-cpi-tenants-and-auto/bc-p/13441939
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/working-with-encrypted-key-value-maps-using-sap-cloud-platform-api/ba-p/13405590

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts

Hi @rupambhatta , 
Thanks for the valuble article. it really explained everything well. I tried implementing and worked for me and it is really helpful.
is it possible to maintain parameters for a application in the consumer subaccounts ?

Dinesh

entry.title: Solman_Setupの管理対象システム設定について
entry.content:
In solman_setup=>Enter System Parameters step, the ABAP setup user cannot be changed


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to clear the old FRUN entry/stuff in CALM
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have decided to use CALM as a proxy to FRUN and need your support to clear the old FRUN entry/stuff in CALM.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solman_Setupの管理対象システム設定について
entry.content: お手数をおかけしますが、管理対象システム設定のステップ3.Maintain RFCs=>Managed System Setup Userの所にユーザーを変更してください。

entry.title: Re: How to clear the old FRUN entry/stuff in CALM
entry.content:
Hello Customer,

Before removing entries from Landscape Management of SAP Cloud ALM, you need to disable the data collection and remove/delete the configurations in use cases.
Please follow the guidance in KBA :
3248215 How to delete Service/Systems in SAP Cloud ALM

Best regards,
Ellie
SAP Support

entry.title: Inactivate Ext Users are being assigned to a Course
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day! I have External Users in LMS who were deactivated in LMS manually. Before deactivation they were assigned to the Course that is associated to a Curricula.

Then we revised the Item in the Curricula. So during revision: Update User Learning Plan is set to YES.

Question, is it normal behavior when user were already deactivated in LMS will still be assigned to a Curricula after revision? Please advise.

 

Regards,

Sally

entry.title: 在销售领域充分利用机器学习能力：使用 SAP 分析云实现高级价格批量预测
entry.content:
简介 

不断变化的销售环境给企业带来了许多挑战，企业不仅需要准确地计划其销售量和收入预测，还要考虑价格变化对这些预测的影响。本博文将介绍企业如何利用 SAP 分析云以及其许可中包含的“面向公司 FP&A 的内容”快速销售计划包，优化销售量价格计划。 

 

除了快速软件包中的计划选项外，我们还内置了报表和分析功能，以便用户更好地了解价格-数量组合，并将结果合并入计划中。如果您感兴趣，我很乐意在未来的博客中讨论这些选项。   

现在我们将主要介绍：基于机器学习的预测场景的使用，以及在预测中将价格作为重要影响因素进行集成。 

以下示例中，我将介绍如何简单地调整 SAP 分析云中的现有内容，以享受到机器学习预测带来的好处。 

使用 SAP 分析云进行销售量价格计划 

SAP 分析云为公司提供了一个用于分析和计划销售活动的强大平台。通过免费的“公司 FP&A 内容”快速销售计划包，公司可以使用现成的仪表盘和模型，来快速、准确地创建销售预测，同时考虑价格的波动变化。在标准包中，计划者可以非常灵活地计划数量、价格、折扣和其他变量。为了引入机器学习生成的预测结果，我想扩展 SAP 分析云的功能包中的一些选项。这会减少计划中需要的手动工作量，因为大部分预测都可以从自动预测中生成。 

预测场景和机器学习 

销售量价格计划的一个重要方面是使用机器学习支持的预测场景。这些预测场景分析历史销售数据和其他相关因素，以自动生成考虑价格变化的未来销售预测。价格更改是计划员输入的未来变量，作为预测期间内机器预测的影响因素。 

将价格集成为影响因素 

销售量价格计划的一个重要组成部分是，将价格视为销售预测的影响因素。通过将价格数据集成到分析中，公司可以更好地了解价格变化将如何影响其未来的销售数据。这些信息使公司能够对其定价策略做出明智的决策，并相应地调整其销售预测。同时，由于系统自动将价格作为预测的影响因素，因此也可以显著减少手动工作量。 

对未来的展望 

为了展示价格变化对未来销售数据的影响，在示例公司中，我们计划将自行车（“山地自行车”）的极端价格设置在三月（示例中提供了截至2023年9月的实际数据）。在预测中添加这种极端的价格后，我们可以看看这种变化将如何影响销售数据以及整体的销售目标。 

SAP 分析云中场景的结构 

我们需要以下版本（场景）： 

  • 实际（截至 2023 年 9 月的实际数据） 
  • 计划（计划场景，其中还将计划未来价格） 
  • Predictive_ML（传输实际数据和未来价格的场景）。 

“拟合预测方案”是在 Predictive_ML 版本的私有副本上执行的。预测运行后，预测值将传输到私有版本，也可以复制回到 Predictive_ML 版本。这些操作（数据操作）的执行由嵌入 SAP 分析云故事中的按钮触发。 

结论： 

销售量价格计划是许多公司销售成功的关键之处。通过使用 SAP 分析云和预测场景，公司可以改进销售预测并制定有关销售策略的更明智的决策。通过集成价格作为影响因素，公司可以更好地了解价格变化对其销售数据的影响，并相应地调整其策略。通过清晰地了解未来和减少手动工作量，公司可以更有效地实现销售目标，并确保销售的长期成功。SAP 分析云和内容包（例如快速销售计划和分析）可帮助解决此问题。 

希望本博客给您提供了足够的信息和启发。如果您有任何问题、反馈或想法要分享，欢迎随时与我们联系。您的意见对于未来的讨论和内容很有价值。感谢您的阅读，希望您在使用 SAP 分析云进行销售计划工作时顺利。 

 

原文作者：dirkpelz 

原文链接：Unleashing AI and Machine Learning in Sales: Advanced Price-Volume Forecasting with SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Change region cache use SPEL V2105
entry.content: Did you mean entityregion and not entryregion? We don't have entry region. The max limit could depend on the total heap memory allocated to the JVM process. In a small or medium size sandbox environment, it could be 500k ~ 800k. Also the total cache size for all regions depends on your Commerce Cloud license.
